## Summary

- what changed
- why it changed

## Validation

- [ ] `make check`
- [ ] `python3 scripts/repo_manager.py validate-all`
- [ ] relevant manual verification completed

## Checklist

- [ ] scoped to one logical change
- [ ] docs updated if behavior changed
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` updated for user-visible changes
- [ ] no generated local runtime state committed
